entry.title: OF EARNED SPIES AND CHANGING FATE
entry.summary:
Author: OfTintagel

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,438Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 4

Summary: What if Merlin was the one who saw and helped Kara in 5x11? Or, Kara becomes a spy for them, sending them information about Morgana and Arthur starts learning about magic- and somewhere he comes to a conclusion that Merlin is a seer but that Merlin does not know that. A s5 fix-it.

entry.title: The Sundered Soul
entry.summary:
Author: DarkWhimsy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 161,414Chapters: 15/20Kudos: 521

Summary: When a sparring accident nearly kills Arthur, Merlin reacts without thinking - and exposes his magic before the entire training yard. But the fallout is interrupted by a sorcerer’s attack that rips Merlin’s soul from his body, leaving behind only Emrys: magic incarnate, stripped of warmth and memory. As Camelot reels, Arthur must face not just the politics of magic and the prophecy surrounding him, but his own feelings for the servant who has always stood by his side. Magic has always come at a cost - but Arthur never imagined the price would be Merlin himself.

entry.title: For Good
entry.summary:
Author: elevenincamelot

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 103,705Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 241

Summary: Fifteen hundred years. I’m sure it’s been fifteen hundred years because I’ve felt every single moment of it. Every draw of breath, every step on the hard ground, every ounce of stark reality has been obvious to me. I’m not the same as I was. Time has a way of digging deep into your spirit and settling its claws there. And I will wait. I have no choice, but I keep telling myself that wouldn’t matter. It might not matter. Would he even know me? Behind this familiar face is a creature who has lived the lives of hundreds of tortured souls. Does it show? Could he see the desperation there? If I made him look, really look...If he were here, I like to think I could be who I once was. Could feel the release of the claws of time like a weight coming off my chest. I like to think that weight would be erased. That I would be whole again. Have I only changed for the interim? Could that shroud be lifted for good?

entry.title: Conversations between Siblings
entry.summary:
Author: Secrecy3000

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,593Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: Arthur and Morgana did not get along, not anymore, despite very successfully running a kingdom together. The people around them know to never leave them alone together in a room, but one faithful day, they forget, and things escalate a bit, leading to Arthur having a revelation. -----Arthur: I've known Merlin for a decade, I know every little thing about himMorgana: Even that he has magic?Arthur: he has what now

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,340Chapters: 26/27Kudos: 82

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

entry.summary:
Author: JasonToddFanboy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,145Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: AU. After the Battle of Camlann, Merlin waits until almost the last moment to tell Arthur his secret, but all is not what it seems. Inspired by Katie McGrath (Morgana) based on her commentary during the final episode: https://youtu.be/Ncu506piuuc?si=x3P0nNULQ-M4aRuf&t=330

entry.title: Someone worth waiting for
entry.summary:
Author: sirena_cliffs32

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,395Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 3

Summary: Merlin waits for Arthur, but the years weigh on him. Arthur returns to world very different from what he knew. Arthur discovers the world has changed, maybe for the better.   Basically Arthur crawls back from the dead to love Merlin. Disclaimer: It has been literal years since I watched the show. I did watch that one Merlin being sassy for 15 mins video as a refresher...

entry.title: Love Snatched from the Veil
entry.summary:
Author: AstridMagic

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,915Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: "For all your magic Merlin you can't save my life." Merlin finds the power within himself to help heal Arthur at Avalon and he and Arthur are gifted with a second chance to restore magic to Albion together and bring about an age of prosperity and peace. On the journey back to Camelot Arthur and Merlin grow ever closer and Merlin has the time to share everything that he has gone through with Arthur. Back in Camelot Arthur and Merlin wrestle with whether revealing Merlin's identity as Emrys to the rest of the knights and people will aid in the acceptance of magic again. Meanwhile, just before the battle of Camlann, Lancelot returned from the veil (for real this time) and Gwen is torn between her loyalty to Arthur and her true feelings for Lancelot, while suspecting that in his heart Arthur has always yearned for somebody else.

entry.title: Reign of Bloody Time
entry.summary:
Author: BadAshWolf

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,341Chapters: 7/20Kudos: 21

Summary: For years, he carved lines into the earth and runes into his own skin. Now, it is time to crack both open and drag the future back to his King. But, as warned in the days of old, nothing is brought back without a cost. He is a king-maker who has outlived his sovereign; a warlock who has finally stopped bartering with words and started bartering with existence. He will pay any price if it means his heart never goes where he cannot follow him again. Merlin burrows to a past that hasn't yet bled, and is no longer the bumbling servant Camelot remembers. He is something older, hungrier, and powerful beyond measure. This time, Arthur will not just wear a crown; Merlin will carve him into a god to match his own dark divinity. And if it takes a little blood to bind them together, to ensure what he is owed, who he earned, then Merlin will gladly teach his prince how to thirst for it. A long time-travel fix-it, a terrible and magnificent Merlin, an Arthur remade, and the breathless cost of devotion.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Lake at the End of the World
entry.summary:
Author: LonelyWhovian

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,546Chapters: 8/20Kudos: 9

Summary: He is the Once and Future King. Take heart, for when Albion's need is greatest: Arthur will return. It is these words that keep Merlin at the shores of Avalon. Even centuries after the lake dried up, millennia after its true name was lost, Merlin stays, waiting for his King to return. *** Glastonbury Tor calls out in the dark, and some seek to answer.In between fighting for his life and trying to uncover what might cause the end of the world, Jon Sims stumbles across a mysterious selection of statements that point not only toward Glastonbury, but to the very heart of Arthurian Myth itself. *** Linked through nightmares and each grappling with the changes in the world around them, Merlin and Jon, with the help of their team, must uncover when Albion's need will be greatest, and what they can do to stop it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Alliance Through Marriage
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleSkits

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,645Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 64

Summary: After finding out Merlin has magic - and once Merlin had saved his life after the Battle of Camlann - Arthur wants to set his people free, make it so magic is no longer punishable by death.The druids offer a solution: A marriage between him and a sorcerer to bind the treaty. ---------- "May I make a suggestion?" He asked, and they nodded. "My manservant, Merlin. He recently told me he has magic. His reveal is what made me realise magic itself isn't evil." The druids just smiled. "Ah, so we are in agreement then." Arthur nodded, before the druids' words sank in. "Wait what? No. I'm saying I want to marry Merlin, not this... Emrys you spoke of." The druids shared a confused look. "Sire... You're talking about the same man." That did it. Arthurs world fully tilted. Merlin, bumbling, strange, sassy Merlin... Was the most powerful sorcerer to ever walk the earth? What?

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 81,150Chapters: 37/?Kudos: 83

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Among The Wildflowers
entry.summary:
Author: YellingAtPlants

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,895Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 128

Summary: Part three of the Where the Quiet Things Grow saga·༻𐫱༺·Post Not All Dragons and Dandelions, a direct continuation of Beneath the Roses (though can be read without reading either)·༻𐫱༺· After a disastrous confrontation with his father, Arthur Pendragon finds himself on the run with his soulmate. He learns that really, he knew absolutely nothing before Merlin came into his life, everyone he thought were his enemies are friends, his friends are all cruel people (one more princess joke Gwaine... see what happens) and his sister is a meddling witch. No, really. Oh, and apparently his soulmate is a god. ·༻𐫱༺· A story of subterfuge, humour, falling in love, overthrowing a tyrant king and cheese that tastes like apple pies... or something like that.

entry.title: Recipe for Disaster
entry.summary:
Author: reclaiming_erebor

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,404Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 8

Summary: “Gwen is dead and to our knowledge, Arthur has no living relations. There is nobody to claim the throne. Not legitimately, at least. That makes Camelot vulnerable to outside attacks from people who want to take the throne. There’s going to be people from within the kingdom fighting amongst themselves to take all that power and run with it.”“It sounds like you know what Arthur will need to do.”A year after Arthur’s death, Gwen has also died. Merlin panics about what will come next for Camelot, until Arthur’s sudden return forces Merlin to confront the feelings he has been trying to avoid for the last year.

entry.title: The Eulogy He Gives to No One
entry.summary:
Author: loser_boy08
